rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or clauses without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in guarantees and assumptions
Place component type contracts in component type annexes and implementation contracts in implementation annexes
Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence for stateful equations
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for guarantees
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations
Do not change unrelated architecture when repairing validator diagnostics
